items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of re-signing when the form version changes. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not demonstrate any functionality related to the re-signing requirement, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
